german_requirement.title: German Language Skills Are Not Dominant Requirement
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Limited
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core PMs and Customer-facing PMs, indicating a concentration in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: With 58% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: Work Modes Reflect Diverse Preferences Among Employees
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of the workforce favors a mix of remote, hybrid, and on-site arrangements.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with minimal remote options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 38% of roles require AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Notable Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
